notes: Knicks lost by 17 and offense underperformed overall
Towns played 34 minutes but finished below role expectation
Houston controlled flow and suppressed clean finishing possessions
Houston won comfortably but rebound share spread across lineup
Amen Thompson, Tari Eason and bench wings absorbed more board volume than expected
Sengun posted 10 assists and offensive role tilted more toward facilitation than glass dominance

model_takeaway: Raw team rebound totals did not strongly favor Houston bigs
Game script and role redistribution broke the Sengun over thesis
Towns missed despite playable team rebound volume, indicating player-level role miss rather than pure environment failure

postmortem_summary.key_failure_point: Primary rebound concentration assumptions were too aggressive for both anchor bigs
postmortem_summary.action_item: Increase penalty when opponent or same-team wings have multiple high-activity rebounders capable of siphoning uncontested boards
